data.name: Srv_Services_Desc
data.value: Manage and monitor all available services in the system

data.name: Products_Desc
data.value: All available products in the system

data.name: Edit_Ad_Sub
data.value: You can edit the ad details here

data.name: Hero_Description
data.value: Join the premier platform for furniture and kitchen installation services. Manage your workforce, track orders, and scale your business with ease.

data.name: Hero_Trust_Text
data.value: Trusted by over 1,000+ installation companies globally.

data.name: Form_Subtitle
data.value: Register your company to start managing services.

data.name: Placeholder_DescriptionEn
data.value: Tell us about your company in English...

data.name: Terms_Agreement
data.value: I agree to the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.

data.name: SignIn_Link
data.value: Already have an account? Sign In

data.name: OTP_Subtitle
data.value: We've sent a verification code to your email. Please enter it below.

data.name: Login_Subtitle
data.value: Sign in to continue managing your services.

data.name: SignUp_Link
data.value: Don't have an account? Sign Up

data.name: Message_OTPSent
data.value: Verification code has been sent to your email

data.name: Message_EmailExists
data.value: Email address is already in use

data.name: Message_MaxAttemptsReached
data.value: You have exhausted all attempts (3/3). Please register again.

data.name: Message_ServerError
data.value: An error occurred while processing the request

data.name: Placeholder_Description
data.value: Tell us about your company and services...

data.name: Logo_Helper
data.value: Max: 2MB, Supported formats: JPG, PNG, GIF

data.name: Password_Helper
data.value: Password must be at least 6 characters

data.name: Error_FirstNameLength
data.value: First name must not exceed 50 characters

data.name: Error_FirstArNameRequired
data.value: First name in Arabic is required

data.name: Error_FirsEntNameRequired
data.value: First name in English is required

data.name: Error_LastNameLength
data.value: Last name must not exceed 50 characters

data.name: Error_PasswordLength
data.value: Password must be between 8 and 100 characters

data.name: Error_PasswordWeak
data.value: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, one digit, and one special character (!@#$%)

data.name: Error_PasswordMismatch
data.value: Password and confirmation password do not match

data.name: Error_PhoneLength
data.value: Phone number must not exceed 10 digits

data.name: Error_CompanyNameLength
data.value: Company name must not exceed 100 characters

data.name: Error_CompanyNameArRequired
data.value: Company name in Arabic is required

data.name: Error_CompanyNameEnRequired
data.value: Company name in English is required

data.name: Error_YearsExperienceRange
data.value: Years of experience must be between 0 and 50

data.name: Error_ShowroomAddressLength
data.value: address location must not exceed 250 characters

data.name: Error_AccountNotFound
data.value: This account does not exist. Please register first.

data.name: Error_AccountLocked
data.value: Your account is temporarily locked, please try again later

data.name: Message_AccountNotVerified
data.value: Your account is not verified. Please wait for admin approval.

data.name: Message_AccountUnderReview
data.value: Your account is under review. We will contact you soon.

data.name: Error_PhoneDigitsOnly
data.value: Phone number must contain digits only

data.name: Message_EmailExistsAsCustomer
data.value: This email is registered as a customer. Please use a different email to register as a vendor.

data.name: Message_EmailExistsAsVendor
data.value: This email is already registered as a vendor. You can login directly.

data.name: Message_EmailExistsAsAdmin
data.value: This email is reserved for administration.

data.name: Error_CustomerCannotLoginAsVendor
data.value: This account is registered as a customer. You cannot login as a vendor here.

data.name: Error_AdminLoginRestricted
data.value: Admin accounts cannot login from here.

data.name: Error_NotVendorAccount
data.value: This account is not registered as a vendor.

data.name: Welcome_Subtitle
data.value: Here's a summary of today's furniture and kitchen services

data.name: Srv_FurnitureSale_Desc
data.value: Supply and sell premium home furniture for all room types and spaces

data.name: Srv_FurnitureMoving_Desc
data.value: Safe furniture relocation with professional packing, disassembly and assembly

data.name: Srv_KitchenSale_Desc
data.value: Supply modern and home kitchens with the latest designs and finest materials

data.name: Srv_KitchenInstall_Desc
data.value: Precision kitchen installation and setup by a specialized professional team

data.name: Srv_FurnitureInstall_Desc
data.value: Assembly and installation of home and office furniture by skilled technicians

data.name: Srv_Maintenance_Desc
data.value: Professional and fast maintenance and repair of damaged furniture and kitchens

data.name: Delete_Confirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this order?

data.name: Orders_FurnitureSale_Sub
data.value: Manage and track all furniture sales orders

data.name: Add_Order_Sub
data.value: Enter the details for the new order

data.name: Notes_Placeholder
data.value: Any additional notes about the order...

data.name: Upload_Label
data.value: Drag images here or click to upload

data.name: Upload_Hint
data.value: PNG, JPG, WEBP · Max 5MB per image

data.name: Sample_Notes
data.value: Customer requests morning delivery before 12 PM, with installation team required.

data.name: Tip_Phone
data.value: Verify the customer's mobile number before saving

data.name: Tip_Images
data.value: You can upload up to 5 product images

data.name: Warning_Complete
data.value: Changing status to Complete will notify the customer

data.name: Edit_Warning
data.value: You are editing an existing order. Verify all data before saving.

data.name: PendingVendors_Description
data.value: New companies awaiting review and approval

data.name: Message_EmailSent
data.value: Email has been sent to the company

data.name: Message_ConfirmAccept
data.value: Are you sure you want to accept this company?

data.name: Message_ConfirmReject
data.value: Are you sure you want to reject this company?

data.name: Ads_Description
data.value: Manage and view all ads details

data.name: Add_Ad_Sub
data.value: You can add a new ad here

data.name: CompanyTypes_Description
data.value: Manage available company types in the system

data.name: CompanyTypes_NameAr_Placeholder
data.value: Enter company type name in Arabic

data.name: CompanyTypes_NameEn_Placeholder
data.value: Enter company type name in English

data.name: AddService_Description
data.value: You can add a new service here
